variables.notes: OK. The selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Salary and social expenses' plus 'Other Operating Expenses'. The visible top 'Depreciation' row sits separately alongside those operating rows and appears to summarize detailed D&A components beneath it in prior years (e.g., lease ROU depreciation plus depreciation plus amortisation items). Therefore only the summary 'Depreciation' row should be added separately to XSGA, and component amortisation rows should not be added to avoid double counting.
